text:
No alarms. No rush. Just slow mornings and lighter hearts.

Exams done means breakfast together, little smiles, and their favourite bites served in their Cello Kidzbee Elsa and Spiderman dinner sets—just the way they love it.

From breakfast at home to little snacks packed for a picnic in their Cello Kidzbee lunchbox and water bottle, everything feels easier with their Cello favourites by our side.

Simple days, simple plans… and memories that make themselves. ✨

Follow @celloworldofficial for more

#Cellokidzbee #Letkidsbekids #CookwithCello #CompanionforLife #celloworld

Bhangra on repeat 💃🔥
Plates that never stay empty 🍲
And a house full of laughter 🧡✨

This Baisakhi, it’s not just about celebration… it’s about gratitude 🌾💛
A festival that marks new beginnings, a bountiful harvest & the joy of togetherness

Dancing like no one’s watching, eating like there’s no tomorrow & celebrating every little moment together 💫
Because the best memories are made right here with family ❤

#celloworld
#HappyBaisakhi
#celebratewithcello
#ServeWithCello
#CompanionForLife

Different dish… same blindfold challenge 😋
Served hot from Cello casseroles 🍲🔥

Confidence before the bite: 💯 😎
After one bite: confusion 😭💀

“Easy hai!”
Guess 1… almost 😏
Guess 2… closer 👀
Guess 3 — GOT IT! ✅

👇 Comment if you can guess it faster?

#celloworld
#GameOn
#kitchenEssentials
#ServeWithCello
#CompanionForLife

Blindfolds on. No peeking. Just pure taste power 👅😂
We gave these kids a mystery casserole… and YES, they guessed it right away 😳🍲

But the real fun? Their reactions, confidence, and how they figured it out 🤣
This turned into pure chaos real quick 😭

👉 Be honest… would YOU get it that fast? 👇”

#celloworld
#GameOn
#kitchenEssentials
#ServeWithCello
#CompanionForLife

Practice mornings in this house = full superhero energy ⚡

While he’s excited about his game…
I’m making sure his day is sorted — from breakfast to snacks to staying hydrated!

Lately, what he’s most excited about?
His new Marvel-themed mealtime set and lunch gear from  @celloworldofficial Kidzbee range
(Anything with Spider-Man = instantly finished meals 😄)

Because when kids love what they’re eating in,
half the job is already done.

For him, it’s just practice…
for me, it’s making sure he’s ready for it.
.
.
.

#Cellokidzbee
#Letkidsbekids
#CookwithCello
#CompanionforLife

Some trips aren’t about the destination… they’re about moments like these ❤️
From laughter to little hunger breaks 🍲✨
Cello makes every memory feel warmer.
Tell us — what’s your favourite family moment? 👇

Easter is a season of renewal, a table full of love, and hearts gathered together. 🌸

This Easter, celebrate the joy of new beginnings and the magic of meals that bring us closer.
Because with Cello, every meal becomes a cherished memory.

#HappyEaster

“Bacchon ke tiffin ke liye kuch special chahiye?” 👀

Try this —
Veg Uttapam Lollipops 💚
Hidden veggies + brain boost + full fun!

Aur jab tiffin ho itna cute 😍 with @celloworldofficial Kidzbee Lunch Box & Water Bottle, toh bachche khud hi finish kar denge!

Cooked to perfection in @celloworldofficial Ceramo Cookware 🍳✨ healthy bhi, tasty bhi!

Tiffin khali aane wala hai 😄

Comment “Lollipop” and get the complete recipe in your DM 💌

(Mrs YumTum, dosa lollipops, Tiffin recipe, spinach, easy recipe, snack time, healthy recipe, uttapam, fusion recipe, fussy kids)
